rationale: Section 25.16 is a procedural provision governing property that loses an exemption mid-year. It does not reference or depend on the dollar amount of the homestead exemption, so increasing the §11.13(b) amount has no effect on its operation.
quote: If an exemption applicable to a property on January 1 terminates during the tax year, the property shall be listed in the name of the person who owns or acquires the property on the date applicability of the exemption terminates.
